preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes contra St. Louis City: Arena decidido a aprender de la derrota ante LAFC
preReview.description: Bruce Arena apunta a que su equipo, San Jose Earthquakes, gane los cuatro partidos restantes de la MLS, empezando en casa contra St. Louis City.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes v St. Louis City: Arena determined to learn from LAFC defeat
preReview.description: Bruce Arena is aiming for his San Jose Earthquakes side to win all four of their remaining MLS fixtures, starting at home to St. Louis City.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes v St. Louis City: Arena determinato a imparare dalla sconfitta contro LAFC
preReview.description: Bruce Arena punta a far vincere ai suoi San Jose Earthquakes tutte e quattro le partite rimanenti della loro stagione MLS, a partire dalla sfida in casa contro St. Louis City.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes x St. Louis City: Bruce Arena determinado a aprender com derrota para LAFC
preReview.description: Bruce Arena tem como objetivo que seu San Jose Earthquakes vença todos os quatro jogos restantes na MLS, começando em casa contra o St. Louis City.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes v St. Louis City : Arena déterminé à tirer des leçons de la défaite contre le LAFC
preReview.description: Bruce Arena vise à ce que son équipe des San Jose Earthquakes remporte tous les quatre derniers matchs de MLS, en commençant par la réception de St. Louis City.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes gegen St. Louis City: Arena entschlossen, aus der LAFC-Niederlage zu lernen
preReview.description: Bruce Arena will, dass seine San Jose Earthquakes alle vier verbleibenden MLS-Partien gewinnen, beginnend zu Hause gegen St. Louis City.

preReview.title: سان خوسيه إيرثكويكس ضد سانت لويس سيتي: أرين يصر على التعلم من الهزيمة أمام لوس أنجلوس إف سي
preReview.description: يطمح بروس أرين لتحقيق الفوز في جميع المباريات الأربعة المتبقية لفريق سان خوسيه إيرثكويكس في الدوري الأمريكي للمحترفين لكرة القدم، بدءًا من المباراة التي ستقام على أرضه ضد سانت لويس سيتي.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes x St. Louis City: Arena determinado a aprender com a derrota para o LAFC
preReview.description: Bruce Arena está visando que seu time do San Jose Earthquakes vença os quatro jogos restantes da MLS, começando em casa contra o St. Louis City.

QAData.question: Who won between San Jose Earthquakes and St. Louis City on Sun, 21 Sep 2025 02:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: St. Louis City won 3–1 over San Jose Earthquakes on Sun, 21 Sep 2025 02:30:00 GMT.
